case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF VS. BILAL M. ZAGHLOUL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT  STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ZAGHLOUL, BILAL M.
